Fear and Greed has ticked up to
21
(Fear)
and BTC is recovering at
$61K
this morning. The recovery was led by Solana hitting a one-month
high above $77 after a major SOL treasury firm disclosed its
largest quarterly purchase, pulling broader market sentiment
slightly higher to open July.

Bitcoin posted its worst June in years. But the first two days
of Q3 tell a different story. A new Ethereum nonprofit just
launched. A DeFi token just got a bold price target from Standard
Chartered. And a Trump-linked mining company just approved a
reverse stock split to keep its Nasdaq listing.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

A Solana Treasury Firm Just Hit a One-Month High

Forward Industries disclosed on July 1 it purchased more than
500,000 SOL in its fiscal third quarter, lifting total holdings
to 7.55 million SOL. Shares jumped more than 17% as Solana hit a
one-month high above $77.

The company reported 36% annualized growth in SOL per fully
diluted share over the quarter.

How does Forward Industries decide when to issue shares versus
when to buy them back?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/h6uqxpl39XO48eTgdBpqQg~~/AAQRxRA~/tbHZfwMRHQo1SUmOxUABvp_oslJFE33UXzCRCZTgSBiw1DA2hFU7ui7nh-9CCpSgJdjCBYWNlefJ97c_ti2IcIA_9qwq1fqYdJ1w1nxsjkOczqcNG7b2PFD6_OgysZDMlCffV90mkQBovwxskbulfoG299Dnb4VQT7amC_Gt7p_q4IDHsH6Gx0Uxjnyh7jKxLD3rNLOZNYXR9pqeZ84ivTWdrw42yPVhlJsLIh6lXgw~ )

75352.body: #outlook a { padding:0; } body { margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;-ms-text-size-adjust:100%; } table, td { border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt; } img { border:0;height:auto;line-height:100%; outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic; } p { display:block;margin:13px 0; } 96 .mj-outlook-group-fix { width:100% !important;
